Subject: BPA Cuts
Message:
I assume that on all cuts on COB deliveries that we are charging BPA liquidated damages. In this case $3.50/MWhr for 6/18. Please let me know if this is not the case. Also, how do we track and record COB non-delivery LD's for BPA's? 

 -----Original Message-----
From: 	Elafandi, Mo  
Sent:	Monday, June 17, 2002 10:34 AM
To:	Baughman, Edward
Cc:	Thompson, Virginia; Thome, Jennifer; Gang, Lisa
Subject:	BPA Cuts

We were cut 40 MW today by BPA for peak hours on 6/18 at COB on enpower deal number 305699. Lisa purchased replacement power from Avista at $30. Enpower 897712

We presold power to Avista at $33.50 for the month and are now buying it back from them at $30 to book out.  Of course, BPA should not charge us for the 27.25 supply price under their contract.
